description.ko: 빛과 형태가 하나의 살아있는 생명체처럼 매끄럽게 어우러져 대자연의 우아함으로 호흡하는 자연스러운 리듬과 유체 역학의 시각적 탐구입니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of natural rhythm and fluid dynamics, where light and form merge into a seamless, living entity that breathes with the grace of nature.

prompt: Macro photography of fluid iridescent silk flowing through a void, soft bioluminescent ripples, golden ratio curves, translucent layers, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, ethereal atmosphere, organic motion blur, soft pastel gradients.
